column1: 退職を機に、海外移住を決意した。
column2: たいしょくをきに、かいがいいじゅうをけついした。
column3: Using retirement as the opportunity, I decided to move abroad.
column4: を機に (using ~ as an opportunity, on the occasion of — deliberate turning point)
column5: Noun + を機に / を機として
column6: marks an event as a deliberate opportunity the speaker/subject seizes to make a change
column7: を機に: retirement actively seized as chance to relocate
column8: を機に = deliberate use of opportunity; を契機に = turning-point trigger (less agency); をきっかけに = casual trigger; を境に = from that point on (temporal boundary)
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:を機に source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:low complexity:standard
